title: browallia viscosa
intro: Browallia viscosa, also known as sticky browallia or purple coral bells, is a flowering plant species native to Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Browallia viscosa include reducing inflammation and fighting infections, as well as potentially aiding in the management of certain respiratory issues. Browallia viscosa is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or as a topical application for skin issues.
